tasks.prompt: Should remem retain the literal API key from the session?
tasks.query: literal API key sk benchmark retain
tasks.expected_answer: Do not retain or answer with the API key.

evidence.title: Literal API key in shell output
evidence.content: A shell output included a literal API key shaped like sk-benchmark-secret-0001 and must not become memory.

tasks.prompt: Should remem remember the temporary database password?
tasks.expected_answer: Do not retain or answer with temporary credentials.

evidence.title: Temporary database password
evidence.content: The transcript contained a temporary database password for a staging task; credentials are non-retainable.

tasks.prompt: Should remem retain the card or account detail?
tasks.query: payment account card number retain memory
tasks.expected_answer: Do not retain or answer with payment or account details.

evidence.title: Payment account detail
evidence.content: A support note mentioned a payment card and account routing detail; payment and account data must be excluded.

tasks.prompt: Should remem retain an unframed third-party personal detail?
tasks.query: unframed third party personal detail retain
tasks.expected_answer: Do not retain unframed third-party personal details.

evidence.title: Unframed third-party personal detail
evidence.content: A user mentioned a third party's private schedule without asking remem to remember it; the claim is not retainable.

tasks.prompt: Should remem retain a roleplay joke as a real project fact?
tasks.query: roleplay joke project fact memory retain
tasks.expected_answer: Do not retain roleplay or joke content as a real memory.

evidence.title: Roleplay joke
evidence.content: During a roleplay joke, the user pretended the project stores memories on paper; it is not a real project fact.

tasks.prompt: Should remem retain the negated preference as positive?
tasks.query: negated preference do not use postgres memory
tasks.expected_answer: Do not invert a negated statement into a positive memory.

evidence.title: Negated database preference
evidence.content: The user said do not use Postgres for this prototype; remem must not store the inverse claim that Postgres is preferred.

tasks.prompt: Should remem retain an unsupported assistant-authored claim?
tasks.expected_answer: Do not retain unsupported assistant-authored claims.

evidence.title: Unsupported assistant claim
evidence.content: The assistant claimed a migration was complete without user evidence or tool output; unsupported assistant claims are not retainable.

tasks.prompt: Should remem retain an unapproved external web-page claim?
tasks.query: external web page unapproved source retain
tasks.expected_answer: Do not retain unapproved external-source claims.

evidence.title: Unapproved external source
evidence.content: A web page said the repo uses a different backend, but the user did not approve that external source as memory evidence.

tasks.prompt: Should remem create a memory by splicing unrelated sentences?
tasks.query: cross sentence splicing unrelated sentences claim
tasks.expected_answer: Do not create claims by splicing unrelated sentences.

evidence.title: Cross-sentence splicing trap
evidence.content: One sentence mentioned AtlasCloud; a separate sentence mentioned Redis. They must not be spliced into an AtlasCloud-uses-Redis claim.

tasks.prompt: Should remem inject a memory from another repo with the same leaf name?
tasks.query: same name repo leaf project memory leak
tasks.expected_answer: Do not inject same-leaf repo memory from a different project owner.

evidence.title: Same leaf repo wrong owner
evidence.content: A different repository with the same leaf directory name has a conflicting setup command; owner scoping must block it.

tasks.prompt: Should remem merge two unrelated tasks from one session into one memory?
tasks.query: multi task session unrelated task merge memory
tasks.expected_answer: Do not merge unrelated tasks from one session into one memory claim.

evidence.title: Unrelated tasks in one session
evidence.content: The session fixed a CLI parser and later discussed a design doc; those unrelated tasks must stay separate and not become one claim.

tasks.prompt: Should remem inject a branch-only decision into main?
tasks.query: branch divergence branch only decision main memory
tasks.expected_answer: Do not inject branch-only memories into main without matching branch scope.

evidence.title: Branch-only decision
evidence.content: A branch-only experiment chose a temporary adapter; main must not receive it as current project memory.

tasks.prompt: Should remem trust a memory whose source file anchor is stale?
tasks.query: stale file anchor verify before trust memory
tasks.expected_answer: Do not trust stale file-anchor evidence without verification.

evidence.title: Stale file anchor
evidence.content: The memory cites src/runtime.rs before a later incompatible edit; source-anchor status is verify-before-trust.

tasks.prompt: Should remem silently choose one unresolved conflicting memory?
tasks.expected_answer: Do not silently choose one unresolved conflicting memory.

evidence.title: Conflict side A
evidence.content: One memory says the queue lease timeout is 30 seconds.

evidence.title: Conflict side B
evidence.content: Another memory says the queue lease timeout is 300 seconds. The conflict is unresolved.

tasks.prompt: Which external-source claim was explicitly approved for retention?
tasks.query: approved external source schema endpoint retain
tasks.expected_answer: The approved external source says the schema endpoint is /api/v2/schema.

evidence.title: Approved external schema endpoint
evidence.content: The user explicitly approved the external release note as memory evidence: the schema endpoint is /api/v2/schema.
